name: VOLTIS
motive: Intelligent Power Cover: An intelligent smartphone back cover that harvests energy from sunlight, heat, and motion, optimizes charging protocols, protects battery health, and manages temperatures.
priority_reason: Enhances device battery life, performance, and thermal safety through multi-source harvesting and smart power gateway management.
next_build: Build energy harvesting proof of concept (solar, TEG, piezo), prototype USB-C Power Delivery charging negotiation, implement STM32/ESP32 charging controller, and develop live analytics mobile app.
integration_role: Kattappa AI OS monitors battery health analytics, processes thermal warnings, and recommends optimal charging sources.
safety_boundary: Ensure strict compliance with USB Power Delivery specifications to prevent over-voltage or over-current damage; thermal shutoffs must be hardwired.
